headline: Xcel Energy (XEL) Price Target Trimmed at Mizuho. Here is Why
summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds. Xcel Energy Inc.
